titles.text: Konchuu Ouja Mushiking: Greatest Champion he no Michi
昆虫王者ムシキング グレイテストチャンピオンへの道

descriptions.text: Kouchuu Ouja Mushiking: Greatest Champion e no Michi is an action game for the Gameboy Advance. It is based on the Japanese card game Mushi King where players do battle using beetle-like monsters.
